why-invalid: THE provenance-missing negative. Every quantitative fact in a fleet
profile must be a provenanced value object ({value, provenance}); this fixture gives
vram_gb, memory_bandwidth_gbps, vcpus, and ram_gb as bare numbers, which the schema
rejects (hardware-profile.schema.json: provenancedNumber/provenancedInteger require
"value" AND "provenance"). Provenance is mandatory and structural — a number without
basis (measured / source-reported / assumed) + date is a fabricated default and is
not expressible in the contract.
